This code wraps the vendored appdirs module to so the return values are
compatible for the current pip code base.
The intention is to rewrite current usages gradually, keeping the tests pass,
and eventually drop this after all usages are changed.
List)
platformdirs)
appname
returnc
	appauthor)
_appdirs
user_cache_dir)
?/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/pip/_internal/utils/appdirs.pyr
roamingr
~/.config/)
user_data_dir
path
isdir
join
expanduser)
linux_like_pathr	
_macos_user_config_dir
darwinFr
platformr
user_config_dir)
Z	multipathZ
win32z
/etc)
site_data_dirZ
site_config_dir
splitr
pathsep)
dirvalr	
site_config_dirs+
__doc__r
typingr
pip._vendorr
strr
boolr
<module>
